# `@toreda/build-tools`

All purpose multi-tool for NPM package build pipelines.

## Important Paths & Files

* `<root>/_specs` - Folder with markdown spec docs for features. Can contain subfolders for specific groups.
* `<root>/docs` - Folder with end user documentation published with the package to github. Generated by running `pnpm make:docs`. All contents are wiped and regenerated each time `make:docs` runs. DO NOT EDIT FILES IN THIS FOLDER MANUALLY.
* `<root>/tests` - Tests folder that mirrors the `src` file & folder structure. Every file in src should have a test file at the same relative path in `tests`. example: `<root>/src/some/file.ts` would have a matching test file at `<root>/tests/some/file.ts`.
* `<root>/tests/_data` - Special exception to the mirrored test file paths. Contains util functions, test data files, and test datasets used in test files. This file and any other folder in `<root>/tests` prefixed with `_` is a support folder used by tests, and does not itself contain tests.
* `<root>/examples` - Code examples provided to show how end users can use package features. These files are intended to be self-contained.
